transcription.text: New Juicy Drop Gummy Dippin' Sticks. Packed with sweet gummy sticks and sour gel so you can dip and dip and dip anywhere. A study break, dip and dip and dip. A skate park, dip and dip and dip. It's your dip, your way. New Juicy Drop Gummy Dippin' Sticks.
